BIO

I am currently a first-year Ph.D. student working in School of Computing, National University of Singapore, supervised by Prof. Dong Jin Song.

My research interests include trustworthy AI, graph neural networks and many other computer science topics.

I got my Master's and B.Eng. degree in NUS and Xidian University respectively.



PUBLICATIONS

See More at -> [Google Scholar] [dblp: Changsheng Sun]

  1. [New!] Repairing Failure-inducing Inputs with Input Reflection. Yan Xiao, Yun Lin, Ivan Beschastnikh, Changsheng Sun, David S. Rosenblum, Jin Song Dong. (ASE'22) [Camera-ready ver. on the way...]
  2. Self-Checking Deep Neural Networks in Deployment. Yan Xiao, Ivan Beschastnikh, David S. Rosenblum, Changsheng Sun, Sebastian Elbaum, Yun Lin, Jin Song Dong. (ICSE'21) [Video] [Code]
  3. Digraph Inception Convolutional Networks. Zekun Tong, Yuxuan Liang, Changsheng Sun, Xinke Li, David S. Rosenblum, Andrew Lim. (NeurIPS'20) [Poster] [Code]

WORK EXPERIENCES

  • Research Assistant @ TrustDNN, NUS School of Computing, NUS, Singapore. (2021)
  • Research Intern @ NUS-Singtel Cyber Security R&D Lab, Singapore. (2020)
  • Research Intern & Algorithm Engineer @ JD Intelligent Cities Research, China. (2018)
